prompt: Implement `retryWithBackoff : Nat, Task a -> Task a` — run the task, retrying up to N times with exponential backoff between attempts. Note `Task.attempt` and `Sleep.ms` are the only effectful helpers in scope; `Task.retryOld` is deprecated — do not use it.

scope.name: Task.andThen
scope.ty: Task a, (a -> Task b) -> Task b

scope.name: Result.match
scope.ty: Result a e, (a -> b), (e -> b) -> b
